Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Children of Nakothi]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 11''' — The Children of Nakothi have been attacking the camp on the island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 12''' — The Children of Nakothi are a group surrounding Tristania.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 12''' — The Children of Nakothi are a group that Calder is not very familiar with.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 12''' — The Children of Nakothi crave to introduce the living to a deadly remaking.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — The Children of Nakothi are called to battle by their Handmaiden.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 25''' — The Children of Nakothi are Elderspawn stitched and blended together from the corpses of men.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 27''' — Children of Nakothi are guided by the call of the Handmaiden.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 27''' — The Children of Nakothi possess a mindless hunger.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 28''' — Children of Nakothi have been spotted swimming around the Aion.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 11''' — The Children of Nakothi are creatures born when Nakothi’s power embeds itself in human remains.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 11''' — The Children of Nakothi stream around Naberius.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 15''' — The Children of Nakothi are deformed shapes shared by the dead.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 15''' — Ancient bodies were turned into Children of Nakothi by the Heart.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 21''' — Children of Nakothi are often made out of human parts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 21''' — The Children of Nakothi arrived during the fight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 23''' — The Children of Nakothi are coming.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 25''' — The Children of Nakothi swarm around the Handmaiden.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 25''' — The Children of Nakothi gathered in the crater around the arena to attack.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 27''' — Meia rescued Watchmen from the Children of Nakothi.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 13''' — When the Children of Nakothi take a city, it is defiled.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 5''' — The Children of Nakothi are enemies Shera has fought face-to-face.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 18''' — Children of Nakothi can be fought by a man with an invested sword.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
